description: Record-signature algorithm registry, keyed by COSE algorithm label as it appears in a COSE_Sign1 protected header. Record-level signatures are ALWAYS OPTIONAL in Label 309: authorship is an opt-in claim, never required for a record to verify. A signature's COSE protected `alg` MUST name a registered label; any other label surfaces as SIGNATURE_UNSUPPORTED at info severity (it does not fail the record). Verification is strict, non-cofactored Ed25519 per RFC 8032 §5.1.7 regardless of which registered label is used. Additions are additive-only and must ship with conformance vectors.

entries.description: EdDSA, the curve-agnostic COSE label, pinned to Ed25519 by Label 309. This is the mandatory baseline label that every conforming verifier MUST accept.
entries.reference: RFC 9053 §2.2 (CBOR Object Signing and Encryption — EdDSA) and RFC 8032 (Edwards-Curve Digital Signature Algorithm, Ed25519)

entries.description: Ed25519 fully-specified COSE label. Optional; verified identically to the -8 baseline under the same strict non-cofactored Ed25519 primitive when accepted.
